description_long: This is a round, two-tiered wooden table with a dark brown finish, featuring a unique partial cylindrical back panel that rises above the tabletop and curves around one side. The tabletop and lower shelf are both circular, with the lower shelf supported by a central cylindrical column. A circular cutout is present on the tabletop near the back panel, possibly for cable management or decorative purposes. The back panel has a matching hole, aligning with the tabletop cutout, and provides partial enclosure and visual interest. The table's design is modern and functional, suitable for use in public spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or urban lounges. The overall construction appears sturdy, with smooth surfaces and a sleek, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, round two-tiered wooden table with a partial cylindrical back panel and circular cutouts, finished in dark brown wood.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round tabletop, lower shelf, and the partial cylindrical back panel with a visible cutout.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the open side of the table and the curved back panel extending above the tabletop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full height of the back panel and the circular hole aligned with the tabletop cutout.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the open access to the lower shelf and the curvature of the back panel.
attribute_number_of_legs: central cylindrical pedestal with partial cylindrical back support
